query: build an Excel workbook summarizing per-resource networking costs

metrics.content:
**Workbook blueprint: “Per-Resource Networking Costs”**

Create these sheets:

| Sheet | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Summary` | Executive rollup by subscription, resource group, service type, region, and month |
| `Resource Costs` | One row per networking resource with cost metrics |
| `Cost Drivers` | Bandwidth, data processing, NAT hours, public IPs, firewall policy, DNS zones, etc. |
| `Tags` | Cost allocation by owner, app, environment, cost center |
| `Assumptions` | Pricing notes, currency, billing period, exclusions |

**`Resource Costs` columns**

| Column |
|---|
| Billing Month |
| Subscription |
| Resource Group |
| Resource Name |
| Resource Type |
| Region |
| SKU / Tier |
| Environment |
| Owner |
| Cost Center |
| Usage Quantity |
| Usage Unit |
| Unit Price |
| Pretax Cost |
| Discount / Credit |
| Net Cost |
| Tags Present |
| Notes |

**Useful Excel formulas**

```excel
Net Cost = [@[Pretax Cost]] - [@[Discount / Credit]]
```

```excel
Cost per Resource Type = SUMIFS([Net Cost],[Resource Type],A2)
```

```excel
Cost per Cost Center = SUMIFS([Net Cost],[Cost Center],A2)
```

```excel
Tag Compliance = COUNTIF([Tags Present],"Yes") / COUNTA([Resource Name])
```

**Recommended pivots**

| Pivot | Rows | Values |
|---|---|---|
| Monthly cost by service | Billing Month, Resource Type | Sum of Net Cost |
| Top expensive resources | Resource Name, Resource Type | Sum of Net Cost |
| Cost by owner | Owner, Cost Center | Sum of Net Cost |
| Untagged spend | Tags Present, Resource Group | Sum of Net Cost |

**Networking resource categories to include**

Virtual Networks, VPN Gateways, ExpressRoute Gateways, Azure Firewall, NAT Gateway, Load Balancers, Application Gateways, Public IPs, Private DNS Zones, Traffic Manager, Front Door, Bastion, DDoS Protection, Private Endpoints, and bandwidth/data transfer charges.
